meta.title: Events | Padel2Go – Padel, Beats & Good People
meta.description: Padel events with DJs, food & community. From day-drinking sessions to partner activations – experience padel like never before.

hero.description: From day-drinking sessions with DJs to partner activations: Padel2Go turns match days into community moments.

list.subtitlePast: Take a look at what's gone down so far.

benefits.subtitle: Our events are more than just padel – they're community experiences.

items.title: DJs & Live Music
items.description: Local DJs and live acts bring the perfect vibe to our courts.

items.title: Food & Drinks
items.description: From cocktails to street food – everything that makes the night perfect.

items.title: Networking
items.description: Meet like-minded people, make connections and become part of the community.

items.title: Challenges & Fun
items.description: Mini tournaments, challenges and surprises – it never gets boring here.

planEvent.title: Planning an event?
planEvent.description: Want a corporate event, a birthday or a partner activation on our courts? We'll make it happen.
